title: Lucky Block Challenge
description: Lucky Block Challenge!, Lucky Blocks, Lucky OneBlock, Lucky Race, Lucky Games, Lucky Pillars and more!
body:
![Banner Header](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/LuckyBlock_Challenge/BH_LC_Header.webp)
[![Banner Bisecthosting](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/LuckyBlock_Challenge/BH_LC_PromoCard.webp)](https://tinyurl.com/amy67484)
![Banner Overview](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/LuckyBlock_Challenge/BH_LC_Overview.webp)
---
Lucky Block Challenge is a fantasy Modpack based on the Lucky Block Mod. Are ya feeling lucky? Jump into the world of lucky blocks and start your lucky adventure today! Choose from a variety of custom pre-built maps ranging from lucky block skyblock through to a lucky block race with friends!

[![curseforge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/curseforge_vector.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/lucky-block-challenge)
[![modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/lucky-block-challenge)
[![kofi-plural-alt](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/donate/kofi-plural-alt_vector.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/kesselot)
![Banner Features](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/LuckyBlock_Challenge/BH_LC_Features.webp)
---
- [✔️] **Custom Maps** - Play solo or with friends in our custom Lucky Block designed maps!
- [✔️] **Luck nd More** - Who doesn't love feeling lucky! Open a few Lucky Blocks here and there.

[![Banner Discord](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/LuckyBlock_Challenge/BH_LC_Discord.webp)](https://discord.gg/N8tUm6N4Qc)
### Modpack Notes
- **If you are a Youtuber or Content Creator playing this Modpack, put a link in the description linking back to this page so people know the Modpack you are using.**
- **Reupload of this Modpack or any modified version is not allowed allowed on Modrinth or CurseForge, this includes redistribution to any other website.** (_Unless given explicit permission by myself_)
